form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 11 over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Shy Hi at this track last start over 400m (23.14). Right in the mix.

formComments.comment: Improved sharply when third behind Shy Hi at this track last start over 400m (23.14). Right in the mix.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 400m (23.01) beating Rhonda Full Day in Grade 5 on April 10. Capable of a good showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 400m (23.01) beating Rhonda Full Day in Grade 5 on April 10. Capable of a good showing.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 400m at Maitland behind Magic Wylde beaten 5.5 lengths (22.98). Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 400m at Maitland behind Magic Wylde beaten 5.5 lengths (22.98). Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked approaching the turn into the front straight and shifted out.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.48) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 5 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and five minors. Tough field and looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (23.48) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 5 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and five minors. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 400m at this track behind Titan's Ocean beaten 13 lengths (23.68). Hard to tip with any confidence.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Came from wide draw and finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 400m at this track behind Titan's Ocean beaten 13 lengths (23.68). Hard to tip with any confidence.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels on the turn on to the back straight.

form.formComment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (23.24) at this track in a Grade 5. Has first look at box 8 this time. Suited here and expected to run well.
